startNotification.title: Demo started
startNotification.body: A no-mic sample session plays first, then the walkthrough continues across each screen.

completeNotification.title: Sample replay complete
completeNotification.body: The guided tour continues into the report, home, history, and settings screens next.

segments.intro: Hi everyone, today I'll use one minute to introduce TalkFit.
segments.realtime: It helps you catch filler words and pacing issues in real time.
segments.slowDown: When you speak too fast, the app nudges you to slow down.
segments.report: After practice, the report organizes the filler ranking and pace curve for you.

sampleReplay.title: Quick replay walkthrough
sampleReplay.description: Start with a 10-second sample session so the transcript, pace gauge, and filler alerts are visible without opening the microphone.

reportGoal.title: Report - Goal result
reportGoal.description: Check whether the practice goal was met, then use speaking pace, total fillers, and fluency score to grasp the overall result quickly.

reportScore.title: Report - Core metrics
reportScore.description: The three score cards compress this practice into the key numbers needed for a first-glance judgment.

reportCoaching.title: Report - Coaching advice
reportCoaching.description: Instead of raw numbers only, the report highlights the three fixes that matter most in the next round.

reportFiller.title: Report - Filler ranking
reportFiller.description: The filler ranking sorts the most frequent terms so the user knows which habit is worth fixing first.

reportSpeed.title: Report - Pace curve
reportSpeed.description: The pace curve highlights fast or slow segments so issues are tied to specific moments rather than a single summary score.

reportTranscript.title: Report - Transcript jump
reportTranscript.description: The annotated transcript marks filler words and pace anomalies so the user can jump back to the exact context.

reportSharePreview.title: Report - Share card preview
reportSharePreview.description: A dedicated share card packages the score, top fillers, and pace rhythm for README, portfolio, and hackathon sharing.

reportExport.title: Report - Export PNG / SVG
reportExport.description: The walkthrough focuses on the share card export actions. The real product can export PNG and SVG, but the demo only shows the flow.

historySummary.title: History - Overview
historySummary.description: The History screen starts with total sessions, total practice time, and the most frequent filler for a quick training recap.

historyTrend.title: History - Trends and list
historyTrend.description: The trend chart and session list confirm whether progress is steady or stuck on the same verbal habit.

settingsDetection.title: Settings - Detection toggles
settingsDetection.description: Separate switches control filler detection, pace monitoring, and repeated connectors so the product does not feel locked to a single rule set.

settingsPreset.title: Settings - Practice presets
settingsPreset.description: Scenario presets let the user switch between interview intro, project presentation, and demo pitch with one tap.

settingsGoal.title: Settings - Practice goal
settingsGoal.description: Each practice round can focus on one goal so the live session and final report stay aligned around the same target.

settingsSpeed.title: Settings - Pace and fillers
settingsSpeed.description: The speaking pace range can be adjusted manually, and filler words can be enabled, disabled, added, or removed to match personal habits.

settingsFillerList.title: Settings - Filler list
settingsFillerList.description: Preset filler lists and custom filler lists stay separate so common defaults remain available while personal tuning stays flexible.

settingsFeedback.title: Settings - Feedback modes
settingsFeedback.description: Haptic and sound feedback can be switched to fit different practice situations and personal preferences.

settingsLanguage.title: Settings - Recognition language
settingsLanguage.description: The last step shows language switching so the walkthrough closes with detection rules, goals, feedback, and language customization together.

homeSummary.title: Back to Home - Weekly overview
homeSummary.description: The walkthrough closes on Home to compare weekly sessions, average fillers, and recent change against the overall training story.

complete.title: Demo complete ✓
complete.description: The full walkthrough is finished and returns to Home. You can now switch to free exploration and inspect each screen manually.

shareExport.title: Share card export
shareExport.body: PNG and SVG are supported. Demo mode only shows the flow and does not trigger a real download.

complete.title: Walkthrough complete
complete.body: Switch to free exploration or press Start Demo again to replay the full flow.
